opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I think I ate something that was cross-contaminated at a restaurant, and I've been on the toilet with really bad cramps and watery diarrhoea for about 6 hours now. I feel awful and every time I stand up I feel like I'm going to pass out.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It's been going on for hours, I can't keep any fluids down because of the nausea, and the dizziness is scaring me because I live on my own.

symptom_narrative.onset: started a few hours after a restaurant meal earlier today
symptom_narrative.character: watery diarrhoea with crampy tummy pains that come in waves
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: pretty bad — the cramps are strong and I feel really drained and shaky
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the cramps are all around my belly button, sort of everywhere in the middle, not one spot
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: keeps coming, I've been back and forth to the toilet constantly
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: standing up makes me really dizzy, and the nausea stops me drinking
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: really nauseous, feel like I might faint when I stand, feel weak and clammy
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: yes, I've had this exact thing before when I've accidentally had gluten — it settles after a day or two
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I've basically been stuck between the bed and the bathroom, can't do anything

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: coeliac disease — I have to eat strictly gluten free

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: none regularly — I just manage with the gluten-free diet

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone, no one else at home to help right now

objective_data_offered.value: I don't think I've really passed much urine since this morning
I look really pale in the mirror and my skin feels clammy and sweaty
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient self-observation over video, not a clinician examination

objective_data_offered.value: I've had watery diarrhoea maybe eight or nine times in the last few hours
